result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to ensure universal access to quality education. Education empowers individuals, promotes equality, fosters understanding, and provides the skills needed to tackle global challenges. With well-educated citizens, societies are more likely to thrive, innovate, and address issues such as poverty, health, and environmental sustainability effectively.
